title: [W]New job pay
p1: [W]This page is optional but if you choose to tell us the pay then you will have to tell us if the claimant is paid weekly, monthly or annually.
p2: [W]Tell us the gross pay - before tax and other deductions. You'll find this on the claimant's new payslips or ask their employer for details.
payBeforeTax: [W]Enter the pay BEFORE tax and National Insurance amount in pounds
weeklyMonthlyAnnual: [W]Is this the weekly, monthly or annual pay?

newJobPay.required: [W]Tell us the pay before tax and NI
newJobPay.invalidCurrency: [W]Enter pay before tax and NI in the correct format, for example £600 or £193.54
newJobPay.tooHighCurrency: [W]Pay before tax and NI must be £9,999,999.99 or less
